hero.slide1Sub: Modern fields, practical experience, and up to 2,000,000 UZS monthly scholarship at Topex Texnikumi.
hero.slide2Sub: Special programs for grades 10-11 with professional tracks and international standards.
hero.slide3Sub: 3+ branches, 50+ professional teachers, 600+ students — your future career starts here.
hero.note: For 9th grade graduates and those who did not complete 11-year education!

about.label: Why us
about.title: About the College
about.slogan: Topex Texnikumi — Quality Education, Real Results!
about.paragraph: Topex College is a modern private college operating in Chilanzar district of Tashkent since 2022. We provide high-quality education, professional fields, and olympiad preparation for over 600 students in grades 10-11. Experienced teachers, modern classrooms, and an individual approach help unlock every student's potential.

team.label: Our specialists
team.title: Meet our team
team.paragraph: Topex College employs over 50 professional teachers and practicing specialists. Most of them have years of experience in their fields: IT, marketing, banking, graphics, and other modern directions. Our teachers provide not only theoretical knowledge but also real work experience and career advice.

items.n1: The meaning of our life is children!
items.n4: Week of practical classes and projects

form.label: Have a question?
form.title: Fill in your details
form.paragraph: Leave your phone number and we will answer all your questions!
form.agree: I agree to the processing of personal data, receive newsletters from "Topex College" and agree to the privacy policy.
